originalTitle: Billionaires are loading up on these superior stocks. Why it pays to follow their money.
summary: The second quarter was a six-year best for U.S. stocks — here are the three sectors poised to lead the next leg higher.
content: The second quarter was a six-year best for U.S. stocks — here are the three sectors poised to lead the next leg higher.
chineseTitle: 亿万富翁正在买入这些优质股票。为什么追随他们的钱是值得的。
chineseSummary: 第二季度是美国股市六年来最好的季度——以下三个板块有望引领下一波上涨。
chineseContent: 第二季度是美国股市六年来最好的季度——以下三个板块有望引领下一波上涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
